历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Anhui Province under the Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 11934, 12491, 35835 (including Sino-foreign cooperative education Hohai-Lille College), 15579, and 18406 respectively. Excluding the anomaly of 2023 due to Sino-foreign cooperative education, the rankings over the past four years show a continuous backward trend: from 11934 in 2021 gradually moving back to 18406 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6472 places, and a recent two-year (2024→2025) backward shift of about 2827 places, indicating a steadily increasing competition heat. The enrollment plan for Hohai University in Anhui Province under the Physics Category: 212 in 2021, 223 in 2022, 237 in 2023, 239 in 2024, and 246 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion. The 2026 plan is to enroll 265 students, an increase of 19 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 7.7%, the largest expansion in recent years, which will effectively alleviate competition pressure and increase the admission ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with stable rankings in the 60-65 range in recent years. The school level has sustained appeal to Anhui candidates. Hohai University's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin school popularity ranking is 52nd, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting a normal to slightly high level of application attention, with no obvious abnormal signals. Hohai University has top-tier disciplines such as Water Resources Engineering (A+, nationally top), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), with Water Resources Engineering being the best in the country, strongly attracting candidates interested in water resources, civil engineering, and environmental fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity, and Hohai University has a presence in these fields. The social popularity of civil and architectural majors has significantly cooled, but Hohai University's characteristic top major, Water Resources Engineering, is less affected. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province Gaokao is about 451,000, with an estimated 314,000 Physics Category candidates, a decrease of about 2.1% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, geographically adjacent and culturally similar to Anhui, giving it natural regional affinity for Anhui candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Anhui Province (265 in Physics Category), making it one of the out-of-province 211 universities with higher enrollment in Anhui, and local candidates' willingness to apply is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 7.7% expansion in the Physics Category in 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, and the stable school reputation, the expansion's effect of pushing the ranking backward (increasing the ranking number) dominates, but the decrease in candidates slightly intensifies competition, creating a counterbalance. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be about 19229, a backward shift of about 823 places compared to 2025 (18406), with a range of 18729 to 19729.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Materials Science and Engineering
- Geological Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 18729-19729, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 18700), one can focus on reaching for top majors like the Dayu Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 19700), one should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety. Hohai University's Water Resources Engineering (A+) is nationally top, and related majors have strong employment competitiveness, worthy of special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Anhui Province's History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1957, 2159, 2267, 2704, and 2655 respectively. Overall, there is a backward trend: from 1957 in 2021 gradually moving back to 2704 in 2024, a cumulative backward shift of about 747 places; in 2025, it slightly recovered to 2655, moving forward about 49 places compared to 2024, indicating that the ranking is stabilizing around 2700. Hohai University's enrollment plan for the History Category in Anhui Province: 36 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 41 in 2025. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 32, a decrease of 9 from 2025, a reduction of about 22%, the largest reduction in recent years, which will significantly intensify competition and cause the admission ranking number to decrease noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranked 63rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings, providing stable brand appeal to Anhui liberal arts/history candidates.
4. [Reputation Heat] Hohai University's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin heat ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, and normal application attention; Hohai University's ace disciplines such as Water Resources Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A) are mainly in science and engineering, with limited direct appeal to history candidates, but the overall 211 level and comprehensive strength of the school remain competitive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is relatively hot; accounting/finance/auditing is divided and wait-and-see; teacher training/education is divided and wait-and-see. Hohai University's history category enrollment majors include Law, Accounting, Marxist Theory, English, etc., with Law and Accounting being relatively popular. In 2026, the estimated number of history candidates in Anhui Province is about 137,000, a decrease of about 3.0% from 2025, slightly easing competition; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, geographically adjacent to Anhui, providing strong regional appeal to Anhui history candidates; in 2026, only 32 history candidates are enrolled, making it a relatively small-scale enrollment for an out-of-province 211, with relatively intense competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 22% reduction in history enrollment in 2026, and the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, the forward-shifting effect (decrease in ranking number) caused by the enrollment reduction is absolutely dominant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be about 2320, moving forward about 335 places compared to 2025 (2655), with a range of 1972-2668.
